parameters.query: SELECT s.student_id, s.name, s.program_code, s.cumulative_gpa, s.total_credits_passed, COALESCE(json_agg(DISTINCT jsonb_build_object('course_code', sg.course_code, 'grade', sg.grade, 'unit_taken', sg.unit_taken)) FILTER (WHERE sg.id IS NOT NULL), '[]') AS grades FROM students s LEFT JOIN student_grades sg ON s.student_id = sg.student_id GROUP BY s.student_id;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'draft_generated', message: 'Schedule generated as DRAFT. Call POST /advisor/approve-schedule to finalize.', total_placed: $('CSP Greedy Solver').first().json.total_placed, total_alerts: $('CSP Greedy Solver').first().json.total_alerts, alerts: $('CSP Greedy Solver').first().json.alerts, program_breakdown: $('CSP Greedy Solver').first().json.program_breakdown } }}

parameters.content:
## 📅 Workflow B: Schedule Generator

**POST /advisor/generate-schedule**

Advisor triggers schedule generation:
1. Reads students + grades + study plans from Postgres
2. Computes offered courses (ported from WF4)
3. CSP Greedy Solver places courses into Day/Period/Room grid
4. Writes schedule to `generated_schedule` table
5. Invalidates recommendation cache

parameters.query: SELECT spe.program_code, spe.semester_number, spe.course_code, spe.credits, c.course_name, c.lec_hours, c.tut_hours, c.lab_hours FROM study_plan_entries spe LEFT JOIN courses c ON spe.course_code = c.course_code ORDER BY spe.program_code, spe.semester_number;
SELECT course_code, prerequisite_code, condition FROM prerequisites;
DELETE FROM generated_schedule WHERE status = 'finalized'; UPDATE generated_schedule SET status = 'finalized' WHERE status = 'draft';

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'finalized', message: 'Schedule approved and finalized. Recommendation cache cleared.' } }}

parameters.query: SELECT course_code, course_name, program_code, section, component, day, period, room_id, capacity, status FROM generated_schedule WHERE status IN ('draft','finalized') ORDER BY program_code, day, period;

SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students) AS total_students,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT course_code) FROM generated_schedule) AS total_courses,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT room_id) FROM generated_schedule) AS total_rooms,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM generated_schedule) AS total_schedule_entries;

SELECT sr.id, sr.student_id, COALESCE(s.name, sr.student_id) AS student_name,
  sr.course_code, COALESCE(c.course_name, sr.course_code) AS course_name,
  sr.status, sr.created_at
FROM slot_requests sr
LEFT JOIN students s ON sr.student_id = s.student_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT course_code, course_name FROM generated_schedule) c
  ON sr.course_code = c.course_code
ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC
LIMIT 50;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { slot_requests: rows, count: rows.length } }];
